Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Unique Industries, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S Motion for Court Approval and Entry of Consent Judgment as to Unique Industries, Inc. Appearances: Lisa Burger, Esq. of Lexington Law Group (415) 759-4111, appearing for Plaintiff and Moving party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Order and Judgment signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
